abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Partners in Crime (Domingo Montoya)
abilities.text: When this model activates, another ally within 6" may move up to 3". If the moved model is Domingo Montoya, this model may move up to 3".

actions.name: Black Powder Blues
actions.effects: If this attack receives a raise, move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Blues Traveler
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Move the target up to 5" in any direction.

triggers.name: Flail
triggers.text: Enemy Models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Take Five
triggers.text: The target may declare the Prepare action.

actions.name: Fire in the Hole
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 13 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: "That's Our Song"
triggers.text: Once per turn. Another ally in LoS may declare the Fire in the Hole action, which receives a (+).

triggers.name: Blow it to Hell
triggers.text: Remove all destructible terrain and markers within (aura)2" of the target.
